title: Nuclear Miso Mustard Sauce
intro: A modern fusion of Chinese hot mustard and Japanese miso, this sauce brings volcanic heat with a deep savory backbone. Serve it with dumplings, seitan bites, or crispy tofu. It is sharp, addictive, and alive with enzyme-driven fire.

stepGroups.title: Build the Mustard Base
items: In a small non-metal bowl, whisk the mustard powder and cold water until smooth. Let it rest uncovered for 10 to 15 minutes. This rest is what develops the mustard’s full heat.

stepGroups.title: Finish the Sauce
items: After the resting period, whisk in the red miso paste, coconut aminos, rice vinegar, and sea salt until smooth. Serve immediately for maximum heat, since the pungency fades quickly as the volatile compounds dissipate.
